name: TOAPSC
description:
What does TOAPSC stand for? Trapped On A Protogen Space Craft.

Basically your goal is to survive, escape, conquer, etc.

UPDATE: Basically added a bunch of new groups and features.

  • Groups

    • Brutes

    • Giants

    • Intellectuals

    • Succubi

    • Captains

    • Prisoner (what you are at the beginning).
creator: TheUnrelatedQuestion
